name: Lentil & Vermicelli Soup - Shawrbat Adas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, combine 1 cup of rinsed lentils, 8 cups water, 2 teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon pepper, and 1 teaspoon ground cumin.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium and simmer for 25 minutes.
3. In a frying pan, heat 1/2 tablespoon olive oil and sauté chopped onions, crushed garlic, and finely chopped hot pepper over medium heat for about 10 minutes.
4. Add chopped coriander leaves and stir-fry for an additional 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the contents of the frying pan along with vermicelli (broken into small pieces) and bring to a boil again.
6. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 30 minutes or until vermicelli and lentils are well-cooked.
7. Garnish with fresh coriander before serving.
Total Calories Per Serving: 108
Fat: 2 grams
